Menu / audio.spatial

Can Swift packages do spatial audio?

also known as: 3d audio · ambisonics · binaural

Audio17 Images7 Media4 MIDI2 Networking9 Speech2 Video4 Voice1

Built into the OS — no dependency

Apple frameworkiOSmacOSwatchOStvOSvisionOSLinuxCatalyst
AVFAudio built in as of Xcode 26.6
Details

3D positional mixing via AVAudioEnvironmentNode and spatial mixing attributes.
